_meta.source_of_truth: skills/property-search/references/county-registry.md (mirror of the Google Sheet tab 'VA Counties Assessment & GIS Records')
_meta.drift_rule: registry.md coverage-table edits MUST update this file in the SAME commit (Build C brief, constraint 4)

Henrico.technique: Enter at the ROOT (deep links f?p=...:1 get 410'd by the URL firewall); search via the form (apex.submit {request:'SEARCH'}); open result detail (f?p=510101:5...).
Henrico.quirks: Do NOT use AGO 'Tax Parcels 0322' (735-row SAMPLE). APEX acreage often blank -> Zillow immediately.

Chesterfield.technique: Query the FeatureServer REST endpoint (JSON); layer 3 carries SaleDate/SalePrice.
Chesterfield.quirks: Strip dashes from TaxID. Gas OVERLAP: N. Chesterfield = Richmond Gas Works (instant_map), S. Chesterfield = Columbia Gas — the gas DB returns BOTH.

Hanover.technique: Find the live FeatureServer via performance.getEntriesByType('resource') filtered for rest/services; query parcel/improvements/sales layers.
Hanover.quirks: AGO mirror is STALE — use civ.quest.

Richmond City.quirks: Verify sales layer on next order.

Powhatan.technique: CivQuest portal; AGO Vision_Powhatan has SALEHIST — verify on next order.

New Kent.technique: Vision/vgsi: search by address -> Parcel.aspx?Pid=N. CivQuest as backup.

Chesapeake City.quirks: Confirm the MLS before pulling comps.

Charlotte.technique: Search by address or record#. Tax card shows building sections (A/B), foundation, ext walls, heat/AC, sketch.
Charlotte.quirks: Parcel# format: 086--A---7-A (keep as-is). County phone: (434) 542-5546. Well/septic typical.

Buckingham.technique: Accept terms -> Go to Map -> Quick Search by address -> click parcel -> Tax Cards icon opens PDF at /resources/landcards/000{ACCT#}.pdf.
Buckingham.quirks: Parcel# format: 188-2-6A. Acct# zero-padded 9 digits + 3-digit suffix (e.g. 000011611-001). Well/septic typical.

Prince Edward.quirks: CVR returns ~0 sales here — pull comps in Navica (andon 2026-06-26).

Mecklenburg.technique: ConciseCAMA search. May have NO building record for manufactured homes — get GLA from client or MLS history.
Mecklenburg.navica_both_accounts: MUST search BOTH Navica accounts — comps split by namespace: R57xxx = South Central (287); R70xxx-R71xxx = Southern Piedmont (397). Separate MLS# namespaces!
Mecklenburg.quirks: CVR returns ~0 sales. Full workflow + logins -> skills/property-search/references/navica-accounts.md.

Spotsylvania Co.technique: Search by Physical Address: House Number + Street Name (street suffix omitted, e.g. "Whiteheart" not "Whiteheart Dr") -> results.cfm list -> click Details -> Info.cfm?OID=<id>. Card gives Parcel ID, Legal Description, Deeded SF, Land/Building/Improvement/Total Value, Building Info (year built, total area, beds, full/half baths, garage SF, basement SF, porch SF, ext/roof materials), Owner name+mailing address, Sales Information (date, type, instrument #, price). GIS site gis.spotsylvania.va.us exists but not yet verified (JS-rendered, needs Chrome access confirmation).
mls: TBD - likely Bright MLS (Fredericksburg market, unconfirmed - verify before relying on it)
Spotsylvania Co.quirks: First live pull 2026-07-08 (9508 Whiteheart Dr). Valuations current as of 01/01/2026. Owner mailing address on the card can differ from subject physical address (neighbor-owner pattern) - don't assume a mismatch is a data error. [added via add_county.py — live-verify on first order]

Smyth Co.technique: Vision adapter: Search.aspx (Address/Owner/Acct#/Mblu/PID tabs) -> Parcel.aspx?pid=N. Address search on Search.aspx is unreliable for E911-current addresses (see quirks) â€” cross-check via the separate county GIS site (webgis.net/va/smyth/, Hurt&Proffitt-built) Address Search tab first to resolve house#/street -> spatial parcel match, then open that parcel's "Vision Property Card" deep link (gis.vgsi.com/smythcountyva/Parcel.aspx?pid=ACCT#) for the full CAMA card.
Smyth Co.sales_gis: N â€” no bulk-queryable sales layer confirmed; each VGSI parcel card shows its own last Sale Date/Price/Book&Page only (per-parcel, not a searchable universe)
Smyth Co.comp_source: MLS-only (assumed, unverified â€” first live order)
mls: TBD â€” unconfirmed. Smyth County (Saltville/Marion) is 250+ mi SW of VDV's normal Richmond-metro/Southside footprint; NOT CVR-Matrix or Navica coverage. Likely a SW-VA/NE-TN regional MLS (e.g. Highlands Assn of Realtors / NeTREIS) â€” verify before any comp pull.
Smyth Co.quirks: SMYTH-001: VGSI's own Search.aspx address search can MISS a current E911 address even though the parcel exists â€” confirmed on 486 Possum Hollow Rd (order 67546202, 2026-07-09): VGSI address search returned "No Data", and the county's own Streets.aspx street index jumped straight from #470 to #523 with no #486 listed. The county's separate parcel/GIS site (webgis.net/va/smyth/, switch dropdown to "Address Search") DID resolve house# 486 + street "Possum Hollow" to a real E911 site-address point, which spatially falls inside parcel Tax ID 30-A-10 / Acct 84450 (owner HAYTON GORDON TRIGG) â€” but that same parcel's CAMA "Physical Address" field still reads the STALE address "185 Possum Hollow Rd" (its VGSI card is titled/located under 185, not 486). Net: CAMA physical-address text lags E911 site-address renumbering here. Workflow fix: when VGSI address search comes up empty, always cross-check webgis.net/va/smyth/'s Address Search (separate site, same county, more current E911 layer) and take the PARCEL the point falls inside, not the CAMA card's own address label â€” flag the mismatch on the record, never silently rename it. Building on 30-A-10 per its 2026 CAMA card: 1925, 2,576 sf, 6bd/1fb+1hb, 2-story wood frame, brick foundation, Grade D / Building % Good 20 (poor condition), no garage, no basement, wood/space heat only, 3.88 ac. UNCONFIRMED as the actual 486 subject â€” pending Yuriy's owner-name/FSBO-listing confirmation. [added via add_county.py — live-verify on first order]
